services.title: Front-End Developer
services.desc: Vue, React, Next.js, Nuxt.js Jquery modern UI/UX

projects.title: CCL Design Singapore
projects.desc: Automation and data-handling solution across Microsoft 365 using Power Automate, Power Apps, SharePoint, and Excel to streamline processes and improve reporting. I led client communication, gathered requirements, and used AI to translate them into application code and working solutions.
projects.objective: Reduce manual work, improve data quality, and deliver a scalable automation ecosystem with clear, measurable workflow outcomes.

projects.title: Scandinavian Good Business AB
projects.desc: A CRM platform with invoicing, payment handling, order management, and e-commerce integration, designed to simplify and automate everyday business processes.
projects.objective: Optimize and streamline core business workflows with a mobile-first approach, ensuring high performance, scalability, and an improved user experience.

projects.title: Scheduler and Event Monitoring platform
projects.desc: A platform designed to manage schedules, track events, and monitor activities in real time, helping organizations streamline planning and execution.
projects.objective: Provide an efficient scheduling and event monitoring solution that enhances coordination, automates reminders, and delivers real-time visibility into events and tasks with a scalable, mobile-first design.

projects.title: Collection Reports / PDC Monitoring
projects.desc: A collections and AR reporting module covering invoicing, payment handling, receivables aging, PDC monitoring, and cashflow insights with audit-friendly logs and exportable reports.
projects.objective: Improve cash collection efficiency, reduce DSO, and give finance teams real-time visibility into receivables and post-dated checks with a secure, scalable, mobile-first design.

projects.title: Sales Dashboard
projects.desc: A business intelligence dashboard for real-time sales analytics, including monthly/weekly/yearly trends, product monitoring, sales tracking, and product movement analysis with drill-down KPIs.
projects.objective: Provide clear, actionable insights to boost revenue, forecast demand, and optimize product performance with a mobile-first, scalable, high-performance design.

projects.title: Start Up Skillwise Marketing Landing Page
projects.desc: An interactive landing page designed to showcase Skillwise's startup services with a modern, responsive design focused on user engagement and lead generation.
projects.objective: Create a high-converting, responsive landing page that highlights services and drives customer engagement.

projects.title: Music Sound Trip
projects.desc: An interactive platform that lets users explore, play, and share music journeys. It provides features like curated playlists, album and song management, and dynamic sound experiences for a more immersive listening adventure.
projects.objective: Deliver an engaging and user-friendly music experience that combines discovery, personalization, and interactivity, built with a scalable and high-performance design.

experiences.role: IT Specialist - Automation, AI & Vibe Coding
experiences.summary: Built manufacturing and workflow systems that combine React, Chakra UI, Redux Toolkit, Laravel APIs, and AI-assisted automation to improve production visibility and operational speed.
highlights: Built a full-stack Manufacturing Execution System (MES) to manage work orders, WIP, BOMs, packing, route progress, and quality workflows in one platform.
Developed responsive React + Chakra UI frontends with Redux Toolkit, integrated with secure Laravel APIs and role-based access for operators, supervisors, and admins.
Delivered real-time dashboards, notifications, virtual screens, and PDF work packet records to improve production visibility, traceability, and faster decision-making.
Implemented AI-driven features such as MES prompt assistance and workflow automations, helping modernize operations and reduce manual processes.

experiences.summary: Built secure business platforms and integrations across CRM, eCommerce, invoicing, and support workflows using Laravel, Symfony, and React Bootstrap.
highlights: Developed scalable and secure RESTful APIs in Laravel and Symfony, integrating third-party services like Capeway and Zoho Invoices.
Led frontend UI design using React Bootstrap, optimizing user interactions to enhance experience and meet business needs.
Handled client calls and concerns from CA clients, gathered feedback, resolved issues, and provided technical support to ensure client satisfaction.
Developed and maintained CRM and eCommerce backend systems for customer management, order processing, support workflows, and business operations.

experiences.summary: Delivered backend APIs, ETL transaction flows, deployment automation, and frontend ETL presentation across Node.js, Vue.js, and Nuxt.
highlights: Developed Node.js APIs, including ETL transactions, to streamline data processing and integration.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps to improve deployment, automation, and workflow.
Previously handled ETL data processing and display using Vue.js and the Nuxt framework, ensuring seamless frontend integration.

experiences.role: Full Stack Developer (Promoted from Junior to Mid-Level)
experiences.summary: Built internal finance and sales systems with Vue.js, Laravel, and SQL reporting while supporting accounting, sales, and cross-functional business operations.
highlights: Started as a Junior Developer and was later promoted to Mid-Level Developer based on performance, technical growth, and project contributions.
Developed an Accounting Collection System using Vue.js and Laravel for tracking client accounts, managing payments, and monitoring payable aging in the accounting department.
Built a Sales Dashboard Monitoring System to track product movement, generate monthly sales reports, and support sales target analysis.
Created and optimized SQL database queries for reporting, analytics, and business data extraction.
Investigated and troubleshot system issues, data inconsistencies, and application bugs, and worked closely with accounting, sales, and other departments to gather requirements.
